---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Description

Describe the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Any technical details or design ideas?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, research, or references?

---

**Relates to Sprint:** (e.g., Sprint 2, Sprint 3)
**Complexity Estimate:** (Small / Medium / Large)
